keyFeatures.en: Lossy compression for PNG and JPEG images

description.en: Compress up to 50 PNG and JPEG images per month
description.zh: 每月最多压缩50张PNG和JPEG图片

weaknesses.en: Limited to 50 images per month in the free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐每月只能处理50张图片

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need to compress images without losing quality
targetAudience.zh: 需要无损压缩图片的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: TinyPNG is a simple and effective tool for image compression, ideal for web developers and designers who need to optimize their images for faster loading times.
positioning.zh: TinyPNG 是一个简单有效的图片压缩工具，适合需要优化图片以加快加载速度的网页开发人员和设计师
